title: Revolve Group Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Revolve Group (RVLV) delivered strong third-quarter results, surpassing analyst expectations on both earnings and revenue metrics. The online fashion retailer reported quarterly earnings of $0.15 per share, exceeding the consensus estimate of $0.09 per share. This represented a significant year-over-year improvement compared to $0.04 per share in the prior year period. The company achieved a 66.67% earnings surprise, demonstrating robust operational performance. Quarterly revenues reached $283.15 million, outpacing the consensus estimate by approximately 4.82%. This reflected growth from $257.6 million in the year-ago quarter, indicating expanding sales momentum. The company has consistently beaten expectations, surpassing consensus EPS estimates in all four of the last quarters. Year-to-date, RVLV shares have gained roughly 52.4%, substantially outperforming the S&P 500's 19.8% gain. Currently, the stock carries a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating, suggesting near-term performance aligned with broader market trends. Analysts project upcoming quarter earnings of $0.10 per share on $271.81 million in revenues, with full-year estimates at $0.56 per share.
